title: Project roadmaps
description: Sequenced phases with milestones; each phase aggregates items via a lens (target or composition). Phase ordering lives in relations.json with relation_type='phase_depends_on' per DEC-0012 (edges-only authoring; no inline depends_on field on phases). Phase membership beyond the lens's auto-grouping is authored via relations.json with relation_type='phase_member'. Roadmaps reside under <config.root>/roadmap.json and are opt-in via config.json's installed_blocks.

phases.description: Phase entries. Ordering NOT in this array — declared via relations.json edges with relation_type='phase_depends_on'.

lens.description: Lens id from config.lenses; populates the phase via groupByLens. Either a target lens or a composition lens.

milestone.description: Optional milestone id terminating this phase. References an entry in milestones[].

exit_criteria.description: Free-text criteria a reader uses to decide whether the phase is complete.

milestones.description: Inline milestones declared by this roadmap. Each milestone optionally points at an evidence_block + evidence_query that determines whether the milestone is satisfied at load time.

evidence_block.description: Block name whose items count as evidence (e.g., verification).

evidence_query.description: Field-equality predicate against evidence_block items. Milestone is satisfied when at least one item matches.
